property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\qasar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: @ECommerce @Regression @Login @TC01 Scenario: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:14 [START] I have a valid login request payload [END] I have a valid login request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid login request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_login_request_payload() [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" -> PASSED ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED ✔ Then ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)

testcase.name: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload
testcase.system-out: @ECommerce @Regression @AddProduct @TC02 Scenario: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:26 [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 -> PASSED ✔ Then ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Running cleanup after: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload

testcase.name: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding
testcase.system-out: @ECommerce @Regression @GetProduct @TC03 Scenario: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:38 [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_add_product_request_payload() [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED ✔ When I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED ✔ And I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] I have a valid get product detail request payload [END] I have a valid get product detail request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid get product detail request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_have_a_valid_get_product_detail_request_payload() [START] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" [END] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" -> PASSED ✔ When I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_send_a_request_to_endpoint_with(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED ✔ Then ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contains valid product Details [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contains valid product Details -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contains valid product Details # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contains_valid_product_Details(java.lang.String) Running cleanup after: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding

com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.i_store_the_from_the_response(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] I have a valid add to cart request payload [END] I have a valid add to cart request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid add to cart request payload # testcase.name: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully
testcase.system-out: @ECommerce @Regression @CreateOrder @TC05 Scenario: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully # src/test/resources/features/EcommerceAPI.feature:69 [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED ✔ Given I have a valid add product request payload # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_status_code_should_be(java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer) [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_a_valid(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" -> PASSED ✔ And ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" # com.sarthak.stepdefinitions.EcommerceAPISteps.ecommerce_response_body_should_contain_as(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Running cleanup after: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully
